name: Brute-Force & Credential Stuffing Protection
description: Detects and blocks credential brute-forcing, credential stuffing, and authentication abuse patterns. Targets login endpoints, common username/password patterns, and suspicious authentication behavior.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: Default Credential Attempts
rules.description: Blocks login attempts using common default credentials.

rules.name: Excessive POST to Auth Endpoints
rules.description: Logs POST requests to authentication endpoints. Combine with rate limiting for full protection.
